finding.fact: Asked "accounting London" 1 time, an AI engine named you in 0 of 1 answer; it named Deloitte (1/1), KPMG (1/1), PwC (1/1).
finding.layman_explanation: AI answers vary run to run, so we asked 1 time (via nvidia-nim). You were never named, while Deloitte appeared 1 of 1. The firms named every time are the ones AI now treats as the default answer for your buyers, compounding while you are absent.
finding.tamazia_fix_short: Tamazia builds the entity, content and authority signals that get you named consistently when buyers ask AI for a provider like you.
